---
title: "stpolisci"
about: 
  id: heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/IMG_4421.jpg
  image-width: 200px
  image-shape: round
  #links:
    #- icon: envelope
    #  text: e-mail
    #  href: mailto:dto885409@gmail.com
    #- icon: github
    #  href: https://github.com/stpolisci
---

:::{#heading}

Polisci student

- CV

:::

:::{.callout-note}

## お知らせ

- 2024/04/01
:::

## Research Interests

I am interested in Political Behavior, Elections and Accountability. I primarily employ data science. 

:::{.callout-note}
## 研究関心

Political Behavor/Elections/Accountability/Data Science/Japanese Politics
:::
